name: Coupa
description: Monitor Coupa procurement and spend management platform for user access and role-based access controls

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Coupa as an admin
2. Go to Setup > OAuth2/OpenID Connect Clients
3. Click Create with Grant Type: Client Credentials
4. Select scopes: core.user.read
5. Save and copy the Client ID and Secret
6. Enter your instance URL (e.g. https://yourcompany.coupahost.com)

credentialFields.label: Instance URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Coupa instance URL, e.g. https://yourcompany.coupahost.com

credentialFields.label: Client ID (OIDC)
credentialFields.helpText: From Setup > OAuth2/OpenID Connect Clients in your Coupa instance

credentialFields.label: Client Secret (OIDC)
credentialFields.helpText: The secret generated when you created the OIDC client in Coupa

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Coupa users to verify procurement platform access is properly managed

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies Coupa users have roles assigned for proper role-based access control
